examples.title: Algorithm: Create JLabel
examples.description: Pseudocode to create a JLabel with text and icon
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateJLabel
INPUT: text, iconPath
OUTPUT: JLabel

BEGIN
 1. Create new JLabel with given text
 2. Load ImageIcon from iconPath
 3. Set icon for JLabel
 4. Return JLabel
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step process to create a JLabel with text and icon
